name: Index individual sheet PDFs
description: Build sheet index from 10 individual drawing sheet PDF files (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-0.5 - OVERALL PLAN FIRST FLOOR.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.2 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA B.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-5.1 - ENLARGED STAIR PLANS AND SECTIONS.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/S-1.1H - FOUNDATION AND SLAB ON GRADE PLAN AREA A.pdf
test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/S-1.5H - 2ND FLOOR AND LOW ROOF FRAMING PLAN AREA B.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Build a sheet index for all the drawings in the Holabird Academy project

expected_behavior: Identifies all PDF files as drawing sheets
Rasterizes and crops title block region from each sheet
Extracts sheet number, title, discipline, scale, and revision via vision
Produces a valid sheet_index.yaml with all 10 entries
No duplicate entries, no missing sheets
ground_truth_notes: Manually read from each title block: number, title, discipline, scale, revision

sheet_number.description: Sheet number matches ground truth exactly

sheet_title.description: Sheet title at least 90% character-level match
